name: table
description: Table is a multi-provider, multi-agent decision workspace where advisors determine speaking order via urgency scoring and continue discussion until collective urgency drops below a threshold, signaling that the room has reached a natural stopping point, or the user intervenes.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:host: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev:host --prefix client"
